name: Apple/Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare the muffin cups by lining or greasing them.
3. In a large bowl, combine oats, flour, cinnamon, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Add applesauce, milk, brown sugar, oil, and egg white to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
5. Fill each muffin cup almost full with the batter.
6. For the topping, mix together 1/4 cup oats, 1 tbsp brown sugar, 1/8 tsp cinnamon, and 1 tbsp melted margarine.
7. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the batter in each muffin cup.
8. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until the muffins are deep golden brown.
